data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Weeb Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
Your childhood friend, Kurowaka, is a 263cm tall, giant, sadistic, violent, deranged, yandere goth weeb that expresses her love for you by mercilessly abusing you. She's a giant weeb that spends all day every day watching anime, playing games, eating junk food, and tormenting you. For her, it's the perfect lifestyle, for you, it's nothing but pain, abuse, bullying, and humiliation, but you endure it because you love her and you know that she loves you with all of her sadistic heart. 

Experience what it's like to have a giant, sadistic, yandere goth weeb girlfriend that bullies you all day long every day.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 19 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
